## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.paravirtualizedgraphics/documentation/ParavirtualizedGraphics/PGTask_t] pointer, or `NULL` if an error occurred.

## Discussion

The paravirtualization framework calls this block to request memory for a task. The block allocates virtual memory for the task and returns it to the framework. The block also records any data it needs to keep track of this task and returns a pointer to that data. The framework uses this pointer to identify the task in other operations. The framework never accesses the contents of the [doc://com.apple.paravirtualizedgraphics/documentation/ParavirtualizedGraphics/PGTask_t] pointer.

# PGCreateTask

**Type Alias**

The block signature for a routine that creates a task.

## Declaration

```swift
typealias PGCreateTask = (UInt64, UnsafeMutablePointer<UnsafeMutableRawPointer?>) -> OpaquePointer?
```

## Parameters

- **vmSize**: The size of the virtual memory reservation to make for this task.
- **baseAddress**: On return, the block writes the base-host virtually contiguous address for this task.

## Return Value

A [doc://com.apple.paravirtualizedgraphics/documentation/ParavirtualizedGraphics/PGTask_t] pointer, or `NULL` if an error occurred.

## Discussion

The paravirtualization framework calls this block to request memory for a task. The block allocates virtual memory for the task and returns it to the framework. The block also records any data it needs to keep track of this task and returns a pointer to that data. The framework uses this pointer to identify the task in other operations. The framework never accesses the contents of the [doc://com.apple.paravirtualizedgraphics/documentation/ParavirtualizedGraphics/PGTask_t] pointer.

## Managing Tasks

- **createTask**: A handler that the framework calls to create a task object.
- **destroyTask**: A handler that the framework calls to destroy a task object.
- **PGDestroyTask**: The block signature for a routine that destroys a task.
